## Scope

What artifact or repository surface does this change affect?

## Change type

- [ ] Metadata correction
- [ ] Typo/copy correction
- [ ] Link correction
- [ ] PDF replacement
- [ ] Manifest/schema/tooling update
- [ ] Erratum/correction artifact

## Checks

- [ ] Manifest updated
- [ ] Catalog rebuilt or verified
- [ ] Checksums updated if PDF changed
- [ ] OTS receipt updated or marked pending if PDF changed
- [ ] Claim boundary not weakened
- [ ] Canonical URL still correct
- [ ] `python3 scripts/verify_publications.py` passes
